'''Entertainment Module 081''' was one of hundreds of modules on the orbiting [[Citadel Station]] above [[Telos IV]] following the [[Jedi Civil War]]. The module contained a [[Entertainment Module 081 Cantina|cantina]], the headquarters of the [[Telos Security Force]] and the [[Dobo Brothers' Emporium]].

The [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] and her companions visited Entertainment Module 081 several times during their stay on Citadel Station, and later during the [[Battle of Telos IV]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
